title: rubus × questieriformis
intro: Rubus × questieri is a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry species, specifically a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds that may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × questieri include its potential to aid in the management of cardiovascular disease, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus × questieri are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are traditionally used to promote overall well-being and reduce symptoms of digestive issues.
